description: You are an administrative assistant in the Investor Relations department. Format the raw earnings draft located at ~/Documents/Earnings_Release_Raw.docx into a PR Newswire-ready press release saved to ~/Documents/Earnings_Release_Formatted.docx. The release requires 'FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE' (Left-aligned, Bold, All Caps) at the top and the headline 'Meridian Corp Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year Results' (Centered, Bold, 16pt). Include the bold dateline 'NEW YORK, NY – January 25, 2025 – ' at the start of the first body paragraph, running directly into the text. Replace the prose paragraph beginning 'For the fourth quarter, Revenue was $89.6 billion...' with a table containing columns 'Metric', 'Q4 2024', and 'FY 2024' and rows for 'Revenue', 'Operating Income', 'Net Income', and 'Diluted EPS'. Apply the 'Heading 2' style to the 'About Meridian Corp' title, format the 'Safe Harbor / Forward-Looking Statements' paragraph in 9pt italics, and place a centered '###' mark at the end of the document.

metadata.headline: Meridian Corp Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year Results
